title: Proclamation No. 610, s. 1940
text:
MALACAÑAN PALACE MANILA

PROCLAMATION NO. 610

RESERVING FOR SETTLEMENT PURPOSES A PARCEL OF LAND SITUATED IN THE MALLIG PLAINS, MUNICIPALITIES OF CABAGAN, GAMU, ILAGAN AND TUMAUINI, PROVINCE OF ISABELA, ISLAND OF LUZON.

Upon the recommendation of the Secretary of Agriculture and Commerce and pursuant to the provisions of section eighty-three of Commonwealth Act Numbered One hundred and forty-one, as amended, I hereby reserve for settlement purposes, under the administration of the National Land Settlement Administration, subject to private rights, if any there be, the following-described parcel of the public domain situated in the Mallig Plains, municipalities of Cabagan, Gamu, Ilagan and Tumauini, Province of Isabela, island of Luzon, to wit:

Beginning at a point marked “1” which is identical with corner 2 of the boundary and index map of Cabagan, Pls—44. (“Paculago”); thence S. 58° 48′ E. 2,938.13 meters to point “2” which is identical with corner 3 of Pls-44 (“Magamut Norte”); thence S. 6° 38′ E. 2,713.54 meters to point “3” which- is corner 4 of Pls-44 (“Magamut East Base”); thence S. 3° 06′ W. 3,076.30 meters to point “4” which is corner 5 Of Pls-44 and identical to corner 142 of the boundary and index map of Tumauini, Pls-43, cane No. 3; thence S. 3° 06′ W. 2,639.88 meters to point “5” which is corner 1 of Pls-44 (“Bunay”); thence S. 30° 25′ E. 1,567.92 meters to point “6” which is corner 2 of Pls-44 and identical to corner 430 of the boundary and index map of Tumauini. Pls-43, case No.1; thence S. 30° 25′ E. 4.698.10 meters to point “7” which is corner 1 of Pls-44 (“North Base Imbiao”) ; thence S. 27° 38’ E. 3,372.28 meters to point “8” which is corner 2 Pls-44 (“Manano”); thence S. 4° 07′ E. 3,252.31 meters to point “9” which is corner 3 of Pls-14 and identical to corner 191 of Ilagan. Pls-42; thence S. 4° 07′ E. 4,147.82 meters to point “10” which is M.B.M. No. 21 and identical to M.B.M. No. 26 of Gamu. Pls-15, case No. 2; thence S. 6° 31′ E.,1,815.62 meters to point “11” which is corner 14 of lot No. 396 of the same case; thence due east 1,560.00 meters to point “12” which is the northeast corner of the boundary of (Gamu Pls-62; thence S. 44° 30′ E. 1,500.00 meters to point “13” which is M.B.M. No. 33: thence S. 44° 30′ E. 700.00 meters to point “14” which is M.B.M. No. 34; thence S.44° 30′ 800.00 meters to point “15” which is M. B.M. No. 35; thence N. 72° 00′ E. 580.00 meters to point “16” which is M.B.M. No. 36; thence S. 50° 00′ E. 780.00 meters to point “17” which is M.B.M. No. 37; thence N. 86° 15′ E, 400.00 meters to point “18” which is M.B.M. No. 38; thence S. 24° 30′ W., 950.00 meters to point “19” which is M.B.M. No. 39; thence S. 68° 15′ E. 900.00 meters to point “20” which is M.B.M. No. 40; thence S. 68° 15′ E. 680.00 meters to point “21” which is M.B.M. No. 41; thence S. 68° 15′ E. 1,160.00 meters to point “22” which is M.B.M. No. 42; thence S. 44° 30’E., 450.00 meters to point “23” which is M.B.M. No. 43; thence N. 12° 30′ E. 250.00 meters to point “24” which is M.B.M. No. 44; thence S. 84° 15′ E. 220.00 meters to point “25” which is M.B.M. No. 45; thence S. 72° 00′ E. 1,080.00 meters to point “26” which is B.B.M. No. 68; thence N. 48° 60’ E. 900.00 meters to point “27” which is M.B.M. No. 46, thence S. 61° 00’ E. 880.00 meters, to point “28” which is M.B.M. No. 47; thence S. 61° 00′ E. 860.00 meters to point ”29”’ which is M.B.M. No. 48; thence S. 61° 30′ E. 820.00 meters’ to point “30” which is M.B.M. No. 49; thence S. 61° 30′ E. 820.00 meters to point “30” which is M.B.M. No. 50; thence S. 60° 00′ E. 600.00 meters to point “32” which is M.B.M. No. 51; thence S. 60° 15′ E. 950.00 meters to point “33” which is M.B.M No. 52; thence S. 60° 00’ E. 400.00 meters to point “34” which is M.B.M. No. 63; thence S. 60° 30’ E. 920,00 meters to point “35” which is M.B.M. No. 54; thence S. 60° 30’ E. 820.00 meters to point “36” which is M.B.M. No. 55; thence S. 59° 45′ E. 560.00 meters to point “37” which is M.B.M. No. 56; thence S. 8° 30′ W. 4,050.00 meters to point “38” which is B.B.M. No. 59; thence due south 2,850.00 meters to point “39” a stake; thence due west 10,000.00 meters to point “40” a stake; thence due north 2,660.00 meters to point “41” which is M.B.M. No. 27 and identical to northeast corner of Isabela Estate; thence S. 60° 00′ W. 20,000.00 meters to point “42” which is M.B.M. No. 28 and identical to northwest corner of Isabela Estate; thence N. 10° 00′ W. 12,380.00 meters to point “43” which is P.B.M. No. 2; thence N. 15° 15′ E. 5,860.00 meters to point “44” which is Triangulation Station P.B.M. and identical to corner 2 of the boundary and index map of Gamu, Pls-15, case No. I; thence N. 3° 00′ W. 3,069.84 meters to point “45” which is corner 3 of Pls-15 (“Caratucut”); thence N. 6° 38′ W. 4.584.40 meters to point “46” which is M.B.M. No. 1 and identical to M.B.M. No. 46 of Ilagan, Pls-42; thence N. 6° 38′ W. 3,644.33 meters to point “47” which is M.B.M. No. 1 and identical to M.B.M. No. 20 of Tumauini, Pls-43, case No. 2; thence N. 6° 38′ W. 4,873.30 meters to point “48” which is corner 2 of Pls-43 (“Mallig Curve”); thence N. 9° 27′ W. 4,685.98 meters to point “49” which is corner 3 of Pls-43 and identical to corner 93 of Tumauini. Pls-43, case No. 3, thence N. 9° 27′ W. 104.00 meters to point “50” which is corner 94 of Pls-43 (“Kalinga”); thence N. 54° 02′ E. 5,371.78 meters to point “51” which is corner 95 of Pls-43 (“Talaca Sur”); thence N. 15° 24′ E. 626.32 meters to point “52” which is corner 96 of Pls-43 and identical to corner 51 of Cabagan, Pls-44; thence N. 15° 24′ E. 1,182.30 meters to point “53” which is corner 1 of Pls-43 (“Talaca Norte”); thence N. 17° 34′ E. 6,025.19 meters to the point of beginning.

All points referred to above are shown on the boundary and index maps of Gamu, Ilagan. Tumauini and Cabagan Public Lands Subdivisions, Pls-15, cases Nos. 1 and 2, Pls-42, Pls-43, cases Nos. 1, 2 and 3 and Pls-44, respectively and progress map of Gamu, Pls-62.

Containing an area of 64,697 hectares.

Bounded on the north, east and west by public land and on the south by Isabela Estate and public land.

NOTE: (This is subject to change to conform with Gamu, Pls-62. the survey of which is still in progress).

In witness whereof. I have hereunto set my hand and caused the seal of the Commonwealth of the Philippines to be affixed.

Done at the City of Manila, this twenty-ninth day of August, in the year of Our Lord, nineteen hundred and forty, and of the Commonwealth of the Philippines, the fifth.

MANUEL L QUEZON President of the Philippines

By the President: JORGE B. VARGAS Secretary to the President

Source: Presidential Museum and Library
